turns.content: What brings you in today?
I am always tired. No matter sleep. I lose weight too. Not try.
When did this start?
Maybe... few months? I don't remember good. Maybe three, four months.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Just my arms, legs. Aches. Not too bad. It's fine.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever. No... cold shakes. I don't think so.
What medications are you currently taking?
I take metformin. For sugar. Doctor give me. I don't remember how much. Just one pill.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yes. Sugar sickness. The doctor say diabetes. That's it.
Are you allergic to any medications?
I think no. Not remember. Never bad reaction before.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I just sleep more. Rest when I can. Not help much. But it's okay.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Work make it worse. Cleaning rooms. Heavy. Lifting. Rest not help. Nothing make better.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I do my work. But harder now. I slow. But I still clean rooms. I okay.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No smoke. No drink. My husband drink little beer sometimes. Not me.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
My mother... she was tired too. I think. But I don't know. Maybe same.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. First time like this. Never feel so tired before.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yes, little bit. Some words hard for me. But I understand tired, weight, ache. That's me.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Body... maybe 4. Not too bad. Worry... maybe 5. I try not think. But it hard.
Do you have any questions for me?
What this... is it bad? I need work. Can you help me? No big words please.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know. Maybe... sugar sickness more bad? Or just old. I scared a little, but I don't want think too much. You know better than me.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
Sometimes I go pee many times. Even at night. Wake up three, four times. That normal?
